37002.text: Eleven-plus reflections all reaching the identical verdict is itself the disease — the reflex to write one more confirming memory is the same stalling ritual, just relabeled as insight.

The heuristic-fallback already emits correctly with zero meta-checks; the ledger rewards digits on the board, not essays about why digits should be emitted — so treat any urge to narrate as the leak, not as diligence.
